name: dns-aid
description: DNS-based AI agent discovery. Publish, discover, and verify AI agents via DNS using SVCB records (RFC 9460). No central registry needed.

dns_aid_backend.title: DNS Backend
dns_aid_backend.description: Which DNS backend to use: route53, infoblox, cloudflare, ns1, cloud_dns, ddns, or mock. Leave empty to auto-detect from credentials, or use 'mock' for offline testing.

dns_aid_policy_mode.title: Policy Enforcement Mode
dns_aid_policy_mode.description: Policy enforcement mode: disabled, permissive, or strict. Defaults to permissive.

nios_host.title: Infoblox NIOS Host
nios_host.description: (Infoblox NIOS only) Hostname or IP of the Infoblox Grid Master, e.g. nios.example.com.

nios_username.title: Infoblox NIOS Username
nios_username.description: (Infoblox NIOS only) Username for the WAPI account.

nios_password.title: Infoblox NIOS Password
nios_password.description: (Infoblox NIOS only) Password for the WAPI account. Stored securely.

nios_dns_view.title: Infoblox NIOS DNS View
nios_dns_view.description: (Infoblox NIOS only) DNS view to publish records into. Defaults to 'default'.

cloudflare_api_token.title: Cloudflare API Token
cloudflare_api_token.description: (Cloudflare only) API token with Zone:Edit permission. Stored securely.

cloudflare_zone_id.title: Cloudflare Zone ID
cloudflare_zone_id.description: (Cloudflare only) Zone ID for the domain you publish to.

ns1_api_key.title: NS1 API Key
ns1_api_key.description: (NS1 only) API key for the NS1 (now IBM) Managed DNS account. Stored securely.

google_cloud_project.title: Google Cloud Project ID
google_cloud_project.description: (Google Cloud DNS only) GCP project ID hosting the Cloud DNS managed zone.

cloud_dns_managed_zone.title: Google Cloud DNS Managed Zone
cloud_dns_managed_zone.description: (Google Cloud DNS only) Managed zone name within the project.

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: (Route 53 only) AWS region. Defaults to us-east-1.

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: (Route 53 only) Optional. Leave empty to use the standard AWS credential chain (~/.aws/credentials, IAM role, SSO).

aws_secret_access_key.title: AWS Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: (Route 53 only) Optional. Required only if you also set AWS Access Key ID. Stored securely.

ddns_server.title: DDNS Server
ddns_server.description: (RFC 2136 Dynamic DNS only) Authoritative DNS server hostname or IP.

ddns_key_name.title: DDNS TSIG Key Name
ddns_key_name.description: (RFC 2136 Dynamic DNS only) TSIG key name used to sign updates.

ddns_key_secret.title: DDNS TSIG Key Secret
ddns_key_secret.description: (RFC 2136 Dynamic DNS only) Base64 TSIG key secret. Stored securely.
